text:
Created attachment 198125
py-cursive-0.2.2.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates devel/py-cursive to 0.2.2 .

Changes by upstream:
- http://git.openstack.org/cgit/openstack/cursive/log/

Changes to the port:
- added LICENSE and LICENSE_FILE
- sorted variables a bit according to the PHB

QA:

- portlint -> OK
